tests.name: pipeline/service/signatures maps plugin ids and versions before creating the workspace plugin signature
pipeline/service/signatures passes the full config snapshot into the settings signature creator
pipeline/service/signatures reads and trims the current commit sha asynchronously
pipeline/service/signatures returns null when the asynchronous git sha read fails
pipeline/service/signatures reads and trims the current commit sha synchronously
pipeline/service/signatures returns null when the synchronous git sha read fails
extension/pipeline/service/internalBase syncs plugin order from the current configuration
extension/pipeline/service/internalBase delegates pre-analysis through the shared helper with registry and discovery callbacks
extension/pipeline/service/internalBase delegates file analysis through the shared helper with the current collaborators
extension/pipeline/service/internalBase delegates graph building helpers with cache, context, and registry state
extension/pipeline/service/internalBase delegates file stats and workspace-relative paths through the shared helpers
extension/pipeline/service/internalBase builds plugin and settings signatures through the shared helpers
extension/pipeline/service/internalBase reads the current commit sha synchronously through the signature helper
extension/pipeline/service/internalBase reads the current commit sha asynchronously through the signature helper
extension/pipeline/service/internalBase reads analysis files through the shared helper and discovery reader
extension/pipeline/service/internalBase persists index metadata through delegated getters and warning logging
extension/pipeline/service/internalBase persists the cache through the shared helper and warning logger
pipeline/service/discoveryFacade initializes plugins with a workspace-root getter and logs completion
pipeline/service/discoveryFacade delegates plugin filters and index checks through the shared helpers
pipeline/service/discoveryFacade returns an empty graph immediately when no workspace root exists
pipeline/service/discoveryFacade discovers files with default filters, updates cached state, and builds graph data
pipeline/service/discoveryFacade delegates analyze, rebuildGraph, and refreshIndex through the shared runners
pipeline/service/lifecycleFacade returns plugin statuses after syncing plugin order
pipeline/service/lifecycleFacade resolves plugin names using the cached workspace root and vscode workspace folders
pipeline/service/lifecycleFacade replaces the cache through the stored-cache helper and logs its messages
pipeline/service/lifecycleFacade short-circuits file invalidation when no workspace root exists or no files are provided
pipeline/service/lifecycleFacade returns an empty invalidation set when no file paths are provided even with a workspace root
pipeline/service/lifecycleFacade invalidates workspace files and persists only when files were removed from the cache
pipeline/service/lifecycleFacade returns early when plugin invalidation receives no plugin ids
pipeline/service/lifecycleFacade returns early when plugin invalidation has no discovered files
pipeline/service/lifecycleFacade returns early when plugin invalidation finds no matching plugins
pipeline/service/lifecycleFacade resolves plugin file paths and invalidates them through the shared invalidation flow
pipeline/service/lifecycleFacade disposes the plugin registry
pipeline/service/refresh falls back to a full analyze run when plugins request a full refresh
pipeline/service/refresh returns graph data from cached analysis when no files remain to analyze
pipeline/service/refresh reanalyzes changed files and plugin-requested dependents, then persists the refreshed state
pipeline/service/refresh supports refreshes without a progress callback
pipeline/service/refreshFacade returns an empty graph immediately when no workspace root is available
pipeline/service/refreshFacade builds delegated discovery and refresh dependencies for changed-file refreshes
pipeline/service/index returns false when no workspace root or no persisted index timestamp exists
pipeline/service/index returns false when persisted signatures do not match the current signatures
pipeline/service/index treats a missing current commit as matching only when the persisted commit is also null
pipeline/service/index matches the stored commit when signatures are current
pipeline/service/index writes updated index metadata when a workspace root is available
pipeline/service/index skips writes without a workspace root and warns on persistence failures
pipeline/service/discovery normalizes discovery results and falls back totalFound to the file count
pipeline/service/discovery warns with the formatted limit message when discovery hits the max file limit
pipeline/service/discovery returns discovery results without warning when the file limit is not reached
pipeline/service/cachePersistence delegates cache clearing to the shared workspace cache helper
pipeline/service/cachePersistence skips cache persistence when no workspace root is available
pipeline/service/cachePersistence persists the repo-local cache when a workspace root is available
pipeline/service/cachePersistence warns when saving the repo-local cache throws
extension/pipeline/service/stateBase initializes core collaborators and returns an empty structured snapshot without a workspace root
extension/pipeline/service/stateBase reads the structured snapshot from the repo-local database when a workspace root exists
extension/pipeline/service/stateBase creates the discovery service during construction
pipeline/service/paths returns workspace-relative paths for absolute and workspace-relative file paths
pipeline/service/paths normalizes backslashes and rejects empty or out-of-workspace paths
pipeline/service/paths reads analysis file contents in order and preserves the path metadata
